tasks.instruction: Uzupelnij kazde z ponizszych zdan jednym pasujacym slowem. Wymagana jest calkowita poprawnosc ortograficzna wpisywanych wyrazow. Liczba kresek odpowiada liczbie brakujacych liter w wyrazie, a niektore litery zostaly juz podane.

items.stem: If you want to borrow a book, go to the l _ _ _ _ _ y and show your card.
We waited on the p _ _ _ _ _ _ m until the train slowly came in.
There is a zebra c _ _ _ _ _ _ g where you can cross the busy road safely.
Cars must stop when the traffic l _ _ _ _ _ turn red.
Children love feeding the ducks by the lake in the p _ _ k.
You can post your letters in that red p _ _ _ _ _ x on the corner.
The bus stopped at the s _ _ _ _ _ n so the passengers could catch their train.
We crossed the river using the old stone b _ _ _ _ e.
